title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, December 16 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 16/12/2025
Image reference: 2025-12-16_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-december-16-2025_img1.png
Bulkers: Values showed resilience with older tonnage firming as S&P activity remains at elevated levels this week
Capesize Cape Providence (179,600 DWT, Sep 2009, Daewoo) sold DD Due to Unknown Chinese buyers for USD 28 mil, VV Value USD 28.18 mil
Capesize Antonis Angelicoussis (177,900 DWT, Dec 2007, SWS) sold DD Due by Alpha Bulkers Shipmanagement for USD 20.5 mil, VV Value USD 22.06 mil
Panamax Anny Petrakis (75,200 DWT, Apr 2008, Hudong Zhonghua) sold DD Due by Ioclos Hellenic for USD 10.2 mil, VV Value USD 10.6 mil
Panamax Star Emily (76,400 DWT, Aug 2004, Tsuneishi Zosen) sold to Unknown Chinese buyers for USD 8.5 mil, VV Value USD 9.1 mil
Ultramax IVS Windsor (60,300 DWT, Sep 2016, Oshima) sold to Oceanstar Management for USD 25.5 mil, VV Value USD 23.74 mil
Tankers: VV Tanker values for older, larger tonnage have firmed this week owing to recent deals while older tonnage MR values have seen a decline
VLCC Alraya (300,400 DWT, Dec 2005, IHI) sold to Unknown Chinese buyers for USD 45 mil, VV Value USD 43.21 mil
Suezmax Olympic Future (155,00
